report.summary: Created 13 missing OG images for recent learn pages, added BackToTop component to 4 pages lacking it, and audited 62 recent pages for UX compliance including accessibility and mobile layout.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Added BackToTop component to leveraged-tokens-guide-2026 (was missing scroll-to-top navigation)
Added BackToTop component to bitcoin-safe-haven-guide-2026 (was missing scroll-to-top navigation)
Added BackToTop component to layer-3-chains-guide-2026 (client component, was missing scroll-to-top)
Added BackToTop component to onchain-order-book-clob-dex-guide-2026 (was missing scroll-to-top navigation)
Audited 62 recently modified learn pages for UX compliance: breadcrumbs, ToC, FAQ sections, responsive grid patterns all present
Identified badge font sizes at 12-13px on several pages (below 14px accessibility minimum) — flagged for next sprint
Verified all recent pages use clamp() for fluid title typography and responsive grid patterns for stat cards
Confirmed tab navigation on client-side pages (passkey-wallets, layer-3-chains, defi-insurance) uses proper role=tab ARIA attributes

sections.title: Known Issues (Deferred)
items: Badge elements on learn pages use 12-13px font sizes; accessibility guidelines recommend minimum 14px — schedule for batch fix
Some pages (initia, kite-ai) use hardcoded hex colors instead of CSS variables; works but reduces maintainability
Funding rate tracker component uses mock data — needs live API integration for production use
